groups.theme: Positive Mood Tracking and Engaged Users
example_reviews: daily self check in helps me be mindful of my thoughts and feelings i like the journal the insights and the resources for things like grounding ones self and managing anxiety i am not able to do checks in a day feels a bit much that the app is structured that way hence instead of stars
its a good app to track your emotions and mental health
groups.notes: Removed some of the review ids used to sample the group to make them more specific and traceable. Changed Examples as well to better relate to theme and edited theme name to be more accurate.

example_reviews: app completely stopped and was working just fine yesterday kinda frustrated eitherwise ive been using it for a long time and was great until now
groups.notes: Removed unessecary review ids, and added different example reviews connected and related to the group theme

example_reviews: any decent features are locked and its just an ad for better health
complete waste of time you will not have anything useful after your subscription starts
groups.notes: removed and updated unrelated review. Changed review id to be more theme relative.

example_reviews: very helpful its a daily reminder of things you need to do to improve
its a great way to track my mental health amd help me improve
groups.notes: Updated title for the group theme as G1 and G4 were too similar in nature. Revised review id and review examples.

example_reviews: buggy and not useful at all the insights are all stuff youve definitely already googled before
your app does not take disabled people into account and they disproportionately suffer from mental illness
